title: Donnelly's Orchard (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
He who locks a gate doth close
        Pity's heart against his woes;
        But who opens one shall find
        God is standing just behind.
meaning:
"Donnelly's Orchard (The Rocky Road To Dublin)" is a quintessential example of James Stephens's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
